errorBoundary.title: Oops, something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: The app encountered an unexpected error. You can try refreshing the page or resetting the app.

pageErrorBoundary.title: This feature has encountered an error
pageErrorBoundary.description: An internal script error occurred while loading or rendering this page. You can try again or switch to another tool from the navigation menu.

router.notFoundDescription: This feature is not available or has been removed in the current runtime ({{entryPointType}}).
